title: Favorite Least favorite charas and why
display_title: Favorite Least favorite charas and why
wikitext:
[]: Who's your favorite Eva character?             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Thu Jul 08, 2004 10:28 am Well, someone had to ask this sooner or later. Hehe... My favorite character is Shinji Ikari. Why? Well, I used to be like him, and I identify with him the most out of all the Eva characters.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:15 pm I'd say Asuka, if it wasnt already obvious. She just interested me with her behaviour and mannerisms.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:33 pm Female: Misato, because she's Misato! Male: Fuyutski, because he's always calm, cool and collected. Also, he's not an angsty wreck!

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:50 pm Rei Ayanami. Call me super fanboy. I am obsessed with her character, literally. I have about 50 Rei pictures on my wall and 50 more in my sketchbook. And the real annoying part is I DON'T KNOW WHY! She does practically nothing in the show! Why am I so obsessed? :x

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:55 pm Asuka. I don't know why, I just like her.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:01 pm I think that's because of the same reason you can obsess with a pretty girl that is quiet and shy, and you don't know why, so you want to know her more. Rei it's my favorite female character !!! (i hate that Asuka !!!). And Shinji Ikari is my favorite , because i've never seen any TV character that feels the same way that i did for a while, when nobody understands you, when you feel that everybody feels happy and don't care about you, and you feel superior and inferior at the same time for not sharing with everyone else, and you wish that all people die. oops! too personal, i'm sorry :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Slade » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:44 pm Kaji has always intrigued me, but Im still gonna have to go with Shinji on this one.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:35 pm Gendo now who saw that coming....shut up langley

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:38 pm Hmmmmm, I really like Shinji......but I think I'll have to go with.....EVA-01!!!!! DEATH AND MAYHEM!!! I'm kidding, I really like Shinji. Kawrou is second because he intrigues me. I don't what it is, maybe his character, being so open and nice but yet almost diabolical and extremely powerful.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:38 pm Shinji is my favorite, but Asuka is a very close second

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 4:39 pm Rei (like it wasn't already abvious). She's one of the best designed charecters ever. And her personality always made me ponder. And as far as the Male charecters go, i'm still not sure weather i like Kaworu or Kaji better... They both got thar cool attitude.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Jul 08, 2004 5:21 pm Asuka because of her sheer butt-kickingness of all things (especially in the manga :twisted: ) But I also liked Hikari for the reason that she got almost no screen time but still came across as a very interesting character

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Thu Jul 08, 2004 5:37 pm TheMessiah wrote: Gendo now who saw that coming....shut up langley

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Thu Jul 08, 2004 5:42 pm i like Rei, and you dont really see enough of Keel to label him as a favorite

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:10 pm Probably Shinji , becasue I can sorta relate to him , but its a tuff decision to pick Shinji over Asuka. Asuka is also one my other fav's because of her attitude ( before I edited this it said titude ,lol.)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:33 pm Id have to go with a tie between Misato and Shinji theirs so many sceens with ither of these to that still provke strong reactions from me.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:49 pm DatDude wrote: Id have to go with a tie between Misato and Shinji theirs so many sceens with ither of these to that still provke strong reactions from me.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Thu Jul 08, 2004 9:14 pm I like the whole old, knowledgable, experienced thing Gendo's got going, and Fuyutsuki, especially in the EoE, manages to acquire the same air about him. They were, after all, the only members of NERV that knew what was going on in the end. Really the scene that made me recognize Fuyutsuki as a strong character was the scene with him, Yui, and Shinji under that tree, and whoever did Fuyutsuki's in the EoE, was perfect for the role. wildarmsheero wrote: Also, he's not an angsty wreck!

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Thu Jul 08, 2004 11:50 pm As for my favorite female, it would definitely be Misato. She's so... awesome. Hell, she's like a hero to me. If I liked women... I think I'm going a little to far. :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by GraveDigger » Fri Jul 09, 2004 12:51 am I like Rie, but I think my favorite would have to Kaji. But my all time favorite would have to be Msiato, because she's hot. I don't know if thats the only reason why I think she my favorite...um...um..hold on...I'm think' n...yeah, yeah thats the only reason. Oh! And Shinji, he's also my favorite.
